title: Lumina Shader - Event Horizon
description: A next-generation cinematic shader pack designed to deliver uncompromising graphics, advanced lighting, and deep environmental immersion for high-end setups.
body:
Lumina Shader: Event Horizon is a complete cosmic and visual overhaul for Minecraft, specifically engineered for players who refuse to compromise on cinematic realism and high performance.

✨ Why Lumina: Event Horizon?
Unlike basic profile edits, Lumina introduces advanced, custom-coded features that provide a distinct filmic identity:

The End Overhaul (Gargantua): A movie-accurate analytical black hole featuring a sharp accretion disk, realistic gravitational lensing, and a stable world-space rendering engine.

Dynamic White Hole & Anamorphic Flares: A stunning cosmic counterpart in the End dimension with custom cinematic lens flares.

Procedural Atmospheric Flicker: A custom time-based light flickering effect for deeply immersive environments.

Cinematic Grain & Post-FX: A dynamic noise generator combined with custom vignette curves for a true film texture.

Optimized Lighting: Fine-tuned volumetric God Rays with manual PCF 2x2 filtering, targeting a smooth 100-150 FPS experience.

📜 Credits & License
Main Developer: Benjiaa

IMPORTANT: This shader is based on Complementary Shaders by EminGT. Special thanks to him for his incredible work and for allowing the community to build upon his foundation.

Original Project: https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined

💬 Support & Community
If you enjoy the cosmic journey of Lumina, consider supporting my work! You can find dev logs, report bugs, and see early previews here:

👉 Support on Ko-fi: https://ko-fi.com/lumina_dev/goal?g=0

💬 Join our Discord Community: https://discord.gg/JK6rTQ9T
